title: loadng.c: Incorrect LRU comparison in seen table uses uninitialized reference
notes:
Commit: db0120e99
LRU now uses int32_t oldest_age=-1 with signed age comparison (largest age = oldest). Prefers free slots. SECURITY comment present. Matches prune_seen_locked(). Bug fixed; LRU eviction works across timer wrap.
close_reason: LRU fixed with signed age comparison + free-slot priority; commit db0120e99
